title: AuraKills
description: Get aura by killing people which gives you abilities!
body:
# AuraKills - Progressive Combat Enhancement System ## Overview AuraKills transforms the standard Minecraft PvP experience by introducing a dynamic aura system that rewards skilled players with increasing powers based on their kill count. As players defeat opponents, they progress through multiple aura stages, each unlocking new abilities and visual effects that showcase their prowess on the battlefield. ## Core Features ### Progressive Aura Stages Players advance through four distinct aura stages by accumulating kills: **Stage 0: No Aura (0-1 kills)** - Standard vanilla gameplay with no enhancements - Perfect for new players starting their journey **Stage 1: Faint Aura (2-3 kills)** - Passive: Speed I effect for enhanced mobility - Visual: Soft particle effects surround the player, indicating their budding power **Stage 2: Active Aura (4-5 kills)** - Retains all Stage 1 benefits - Passive: Strength I effect for increased damage output - Skill: Dash - Rapidly move 5 blocks forward (Shift+Right-click with sword) - Visual: More prominent colored particle trails that follow player movement **Stage 3: Awakened Aura (6-7 kills)** - Retains all previous stage benefits - Passive: Regeneration I for sustained combat capability - Skill: Aura Shockwave - Push away enemies within a 5-block radius - Visual: Aura meter displayed as boss bar + intense particle ring effect **Stage 4: Legendary Aura (8+ kills)** - Retains all previous stage benefits with enhancements - Passive: Resistance I for damage reduction and Speed II (upgraded) - Skill: Phase Slash - Teleport behind the nearest player within 10 blocks and strike - Visual: Custom glow effects, armor overlay, and distinctive sound effects ### Dynamic Combat Skills Each aura stage unlocks powerful combat abilities that create strategic depth: - **Dash** - Quickly reposition or chase opponents - **Shockwave** - Create space in tight situations or prevent being surrounded - **Phase Slash** - Execute surprise attacks on unsuspecting opponents ### Risk vs. Reward Mechanics The power comes with vulnerability - death resets all aura progress, creating engaging risk/reward decisions: - Should players with high aura levels play conservatively to maintain their powers? - Is it worth targeting high-level aura users to absorb their power? - Strategic depth encourages varied playstyles and tactical decision-making ### Social and Competitive Elements AuraKills enhances server communities through: - Publicly visible aura effects that display player accomplishment - Server-wide announcements when players reach Legendary status - Leaderboard system (/topaura) showcasing top aura users ## Commands - **/aura** - Displays your current aura status, kills, and available abilities - **/topaura** - Shows a server-wide leaderboard of the most powerful aura users ## Technical Features ### Extensive Configuration Server administrators can fine-tune every aspect of the plugin: - Adjust kill thresholds for each aura stage - Customize skill parameters (cooldowns, distances, effects) - Configure particle effects and visuals - Modify death penalties and absorption mechanics ### Performance Optimized Designed with server performance in mind: - Efficient particle rendering that scales well even with many players - Optimized cooldown and effect management system - Minimal impact on server TPS ### Developer API The plugin provides a clean API for other plugins to integrate with: - Access player aura levels and kill counts - Listen for aura level change events - Create custom extensions and integrations ## Why Choose AuraKills? AuraKills stands out by creating natural progression in PvP encounters that encourages continued engagement. Unlike plugins that offer static benefits or complicated progression systems, AuraKills provides: 1. **Intuitive Advancement** - Kill-based progression is easy to understand and naturally scales with player skill 2. **Visual Storytelling** - Players can instantly recognize others' power levels through distinctive visual effects 3. **Balanced Gameplay** - Each stage provides meaningful benefits without becoming overpowered 4. **Fresh Dynamics** - The risk of losing progress adds tension to every encounter Perfect for faction servers, PvP arenas, survival games, and any competitive Minecraft environment where combat plays a central role. Transform your server's PvP experience with this elegant enhancement to vanilla combat mechanics. ## Installation 1. Download AuraKills jar 2. Place the file in your server's plugins folder 3. Restart your server or use reload to load the plugin 4. Configure options in the config.yml file (optional) 5. Enjoy the enhanced combat experience! *AuraKills - Ascend to Legendary Status*
